title: HatInInternet`s Better Generation
description: A Modpack That Overhauls Generation in All Dimensions and Keeping the Vanilla Style!
body:
A Modpack That Overhauls Generation in All Dimensions and Keeping the Vanilla Style!

Note!: This Modpack only adds new Biomes/Structures! There is no new Blocks/Items/Mobs

Mod Adds:

-Most of the Biomes/Structures in the Overworld are Updated

-New Structures in the Overworld

-Nether Height Limit is Increased

-Updated Nether Fortresses

-New Biomes/Structures in End

-Main Island in End is Updated

-End Height Limit is Increased

-Biome Names Pop-Up When Entering a Biome
